object.name: getUserPersonalChatMessages
object.description: Use this method to get the last messages from the personal chat (i.e., the chat currently added to their profile) of a given user. On success, an Array of Message objects is returned.
object.html_description: Use this method to get the last messages from the personal chat (i.e., the chat currently added to their profile) of a given user. On success, an Array of Message objects is returned.
object.rst_description: Use this method to get the last messages from the personal chat (i.e., the chat currently added to their profile) of a given user. On success, an Array of :class:`aiogram.types.message.Message` objects is returned.

annotations.description: Unique identifier for the target user
annotations.rst_description: Unique identifier for the target user
annotations.name: user_id

annotations.description: The maximum number of messages to return; 1-20
annotations.html_description: The maximum number of messages to return; 1-20
annotations.rst_description: The maximum number of messages to return; 1-20
annotations.name: limit
